nasb.text: So it came about in the course of time that Cain brought an offering to the Lord of the fruit of the ground.

esv.text: In the course of time Cain brought to the Lord an offering of the fruit of the ground,

cnv.text: 有一天，該隱把地裡的出產拿來，當作禮物獻給耶和華。

ccb.text: 到了收成的时候，该隐把地里的出产当祭物献给耶和华，

csbs.text: 过了一些日子，该隐带来土地的出产，作为供物献给耶和华；
